reviewedKeys.notes: Stress on proper name Yacoub needs manual override.
Year 2009 should be spelled out in classical Arabic for consistent neural reading.

reviewedKeys.text: وَلا يِهِمَّك، فَكِّر شُوَيَّة وَجَرِّب تاني.
reviewedKeys.notes: End of phrase is slightly rushed.
reviewedKeys.suggestedOverride: وَلا يِهِمَّك، فَكِّر شُوَيَّة... وَجَرِّب تَانِي.

reviewedKeys.notes: Proper noun Aswan needs explicit vocalization.
